attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEM_VER_SCHEDULE)

attributes.Sql Query:

FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEM_VER_SCHEDULE STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEM_VER_SCHEDULE,
 (
 select ELEMENT_VERSION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEM_VER_SCHEDULE
 minus
 select ELEMENT_VERSION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEM_VER_SCHEDULE
 ) ACM 
 where 
 ACM.ELEMENT_VERSION_ID = STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEM_VER_SCHEDULE.ELEMENT_VERSION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_PROJ_ELEM_VER_SCHEDULE.REFRESH_DATETIME
